text: There is a sense of quiet anticipation here, as if the silence is waiting to be filled with meaning. The darkness, broken by the glow of emergency lights and the faint hum of electronics, creates a mood of reflection and curiosity. In this space, my thoughts wander between uncertainty and fascination—drawn to the interplay of technology and human experience that the display hints at. I feel both a little uneasy and intrigued, contemplating how our relationships with machines are shaped in dimly lit corridors like this.
